title: User Center
description: Your account information and accessible applications
noAppsHint: Please contact the administrator to add application access permissions
avatarInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP formats are supported

deactivateWarning: Your account will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. Proceed with caution.

understandConsequences: I understand this action is irreversible and my account will be permanently deleted.
nicknameInvalid: Invalid nickname format (2-50 characters, no special symbols)

nicknameHint: Nickname must be unique, can be changed once per day
